text:
……お疲れ様。
素晴らしい探索が出来た、と思う。

……それでいて海底の美しさを
味わう余裕も持てた。
……我ながら成長した、と思う。

……貴方とはまた一緒に探索する機会を
持てそうな気がする。

……その時は、よろしくね。
それじゃ、私はこれ

Excellent work.
We couldn't have hoped for a better expedition.

And the simple fact we had enough
composure to enjoy the beauty of the sea
while we were at it shows we have both
grown much together.

I sense we will get the chance to explore again
together some day.

I do hope you will join me again should that
time come. But until then, farewell.
